name_en: 🎁🎁Original M82509🦒Lily Wallet On Chain. Cut from a square Monogram canvas, the flap is embellished with studs and a Louis Vuitton logo plate. Ample space easily holds daily essentials, and the LV Circle logo is a detachable and adjustable chain, creating multiple carrying ways.
name_cn:
🎁🎁Original M82509🦒Lily Wallet On Chain. Cut from a square Monogram canvas, the flap is embellished with studs and a Louis Vuitton logo plate. Ample space easily holds daily essentials, and the LV Circle logo is a detachable and adjustable chain, creating multiple carrying ways.
20.7 x 10.2 x 3.5 cm (Length x H x W)
